{{Location|title=Britland|imagecaption=Map of Britland|type=|image=File:BritlandFullMap.png}}

==Britland==
God save our gracious Queen! May she defend our laws and ever give us cause, God save the Queen!

Britland is the 5th of 8 [[Realms]].
{{realm table}}

==INTEL==
See [[Britland INTEL]] for INTEL tables.

==Apostles ==
See [[Britland Apostles]] for each Apostles' stats.

==Card Conversions==
See [[Britland Cards]] for a list of all limited cards in Britland and what they can be redeemed for.

==Key Clue Records==
See [[Britland Key Clues]] for a list of all Key Clues in Britland, how to complete them, and what they reward.

==Snail Fleet and Mysterious Sea==
See [[Snail Fleet]] to see more about the ships that can be upgraded for [[Mysterious Sea]] exploration.

{|class=wikitable
! [[Pirate Paradise]]
! [[Bibini Bottom]]
! [[Mecha Sea]]
! [[Poseidon Temple]]
! [[Dragon Palace]]
! [[Doomsday Sea]]
|}

==Realm Trait - Ghost Ship==
See [[Ghost Ship]] for information on cost, stats, and unsealing. 

[[Category:Realm]]
[[Category:Britland]]
